amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 738 in DIY & Tools (See Top 100 in DIY & Tools) 21 in Power Strips

features: ►Multi-Function: This 13A extension lead with total power supply up to 3120W, enables you to power up 6 appliances simultaneously. Ideal for using in home, offices, entertainment centers and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected.

►Surge Protection: Built with high-quality components and enhanced circuitry, anti-thunder protection and surge protection, this power strip is protected against over-voltage, over-current, short-circuiting, overload, offering more safety for household electric appliances and a peaceful mind while charging.

►Safety Guarantee: CE, UKCA, BS1363-2/A approved. We adopt anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers.

►Space-saving Design: The compact and lightweight design with mounting holes on the back make the extension lead able to fix on the wall and 1 metre length cable is long enough to reach your powered devices. Ideal for charging multiple appliances from distance in a large office or room.
►What You Get: ExtraStar 6-port extension lead and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
